Company: Anduril Industries
Role: Machine Learning Engineer
Location: Washington, DC / Remote

About the Role:
Anduril is a defense technology company, bringing Silicon Valley talent and funding to the defense sector. We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to build and deploy models that operate at the tactical edge. You will work on computer vision, sensor fusion, and autonomous systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design, train, and deploy deep learning models for object detection, tracking, and classification using EO/IR sensor data.
- Optimize ML models for real-time inference on resource-constrained edge hardware (NVIDIA Jetson, custom silicon).
- Build robust data pipelines for ingesting and processing large-scale multimodal datasets.
- Collaborate with software and hardware teams to integrate AI models into the Lattice software platform.

Requirements:
- Strong proficiency in Python and C++.
- Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow.
- Solid understanding of software architecture and system-level design.
- U.S. Person status is required as this position needs access to export-controlled data.
- Ability to obtain and maintain a U.S. Security Clearance.
